libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 native tests, add nativeTest runtimeArgs for '-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow' and '-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true'. Keep generated tests self-contained with Vertx.vertx(), WebClient, and an in-process HttpServer bound to 127.0.0.1; no external HTTP service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient is documented as an optional feature and references io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; do not generate OAuth2-specific tests unless adding that optional dependency deliberately.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty runtime properties are sufficient on the configured JDK/native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Core Vert.x Web Client coverage is reachable with the normal scaffold and an in-process Vert.x HTTP server, but the 5.0.1 artifact resolves Netty 4.2.x and JDK 25 native runs need explicit Netty unsafe-access runtime properties.
